summary: Comprehensive testing of Bulk Report Entry features (In-App Spreadsheet + CSV Upload) and Analytics tabs (Admin + Consultant). All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI fully verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Test reports with TEST_ prefix created during backend testing (TEST_BulkSuccess1, TEST_BulkSuccess2, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bulk upload features working. Papaparse 5.5.3 used for CSV parsing. Both In-App Spreadsheet and CSV Upload submit to same endpoint POST /api/consultant/bulk-reports. Each uploaded report also creates a call_log with type 'successful'.

Bulk Report Entry Section.description: Shows two mode cards: 'In-App Spreadsheet' and 'Upload CSV File' on Consultant Dashboard Submit Report tab

In-App Spreadsheet Mode.description: Opens editable table with 3 empty rows. Each row has: student_name, contact_number, institution_name, competitive_exam_preference, career_interest, college_interest, interest_scope dropdown, next_followup_date, other_remarks
features_verified: Add Row button adds new rows
Interest Scope dropdown with all 6 valid options
Submit button with row count label

Spreadsheet Validation.description: Empty required fields show red-highlighted borders with error message 'Fill all required fields (*) highlighted in red'

Spreadsheet Submit.description: Valid rows submitted successfully via POST /api/consultant/bulk-reports. Shows success toast 'Successfully uploaded X reports!'

CSV Upload Mode.description: Shows Download Sample CSV button and Upload CSV button with CSV Format Requirements warning box

Sample CSV Download.description: GET /api/consultant/sample-csv returns headers, sample_data, and interest_scope_options. Frontend creates and downloads CSV blob.

Bulk Reports API.description: POST /api/consultant/bulk-reports accepts array of reports and creates reports + call logs

Admin Analytics Tab.description: Renders overview cards (Total Reports, Total Calls, Total Admissions, Student Queries) and 5 charts

Consultant Analytics Tab.description: Renders overview cards (Total Reports, Total Calls, This Week) and 4 charts
charts_verified: My Reports Trend (Last 14 Days) - area chart
Daily Call Breakdown (Last 14 Days) - bar chart

consultant_bulk_upload.spreadsheet_mode_card: PASS - 'In-App Spreadsheet' card with table icon
consultant_bulk_upload.csv_mode_card: PASS - 'Upload CSV File' card with upload icon
consultant_bulk_upload.validation_highlights_errors: PASS - red borders on empty required fields

consultant_analytics_tab.overview_cards: PASS - Total Reports: 10, Total Calls: 37, This Week: 7

admin_analytics_tab.overview_cards: PASS - Total Reports: 10, Total Calls: 37, Total Admissions: 0, Student Queries: 0
